title: Verify separate-target restore and atomic activation
preconditions: Valid current and historical backups plus corruption, version, permission, disk-space, migration, cancellation, and crash fault cases are available.
steps: Restore each backup into a separate candidate; inject every fault before activation; compare the active store; activate valid current and pre-deletion backups; replay retained operations.
expected: Only a fully verified candidate activates atomically; every fault preserves the prior store; explicit historical restore reinstates its exact point-in-time deletion state and remains operational.
